meta.bit_endianness: Qiskit counts bitstring indexed by clbits (little-endian typical); we index with bits[::-1][clbit]
meta.loss_calculation: sum of |p_baseline(state) - p_test(state)| over all states of measured qubits [141, 142, 143] (Total Variation Distance)

evaluation.tolerance_description: Normalized threshold: (Δloss / Δtwo_qubit_gates) > tolerance → significant contribution
evaluation.normalization_metric: two_qubit_gates (fallback to total_gates if no two-qubit gates)
evaluation.max_granularity_description: Maximum number of subsets to split candidates into, limits DDMin splitting depth
